news_items.headline: Rays Outfield Defense: Run first, ask questions later
news_items.summary: Following the hiring of Corey Dickerson this offseason — who has received significant buy-in from the Rays outfielders this season — and by having Kevin Kiermaier in camp during Spring Training, the Rays outfield has quietly become one of the better defensive groups in baseball. They have taken an unconventional approach to doing so as […]

news_items.headline: Yanks drop 7th straight, longest skid in 3 years
news_items.summary: The Yankees' losing streak reached seven games - its longest in three years - with a 6-2 loss to the Tigers on Wednesday

news_items.headline: Skenes lit up by Phils, laments lack of execution
news_items.summary: Pirates ace Paul Skenes lasted only four innings against the Phillies and allowed a season-high seven earned runs in a 10-6 loss.

news_items.headline: Cavalli: No ill will meant with Contreras remark
news_items.summary: Nationals pitcher Cade Cavalli has apologized for shouting "sit down, boy" at Red Sox first baseman Willson Contreras while instigating a benches-clearing scrum.

news_items.headline: Mets' Cohen on firing Stearns: 'Not gonna do it'
news_items.summary: Mets owner Steve Cohen said Wednesday that he is not considering dismissing president of baseball operations David Stearns, who is in the third year of a five-year contract, despite a second straight disappointing season.
